name: Calculus of Rot
short_description: Fight your way through zombie-infested wastelands in a turn-based tactical survival game. Reveal the map tile by tile, manage your health, choose your battles wisely, and survive against increasingly dangerous mutants lurking in the darkness.

name: Angels Fall First
short_description: From commanding the battle standing on the bridge of your flagship all the way down to tactical infantry firefights - AFF brings together all the combat you ever loved in a rich science fiction setting. Boarding, pilotable capital ships, deep weapon customization and full Bot support included!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー500人以上 +10

name: Zombie Queen
short_description: Fight through 100 waves of massive zombie hordes in this fast-paced wave-based shooter. Blast up to 1,000 zombies with powerful weapons, earn upgrades, level up your character, and survive the apocalypse.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Diagnosis: Room 101
short_description: Diagnosis Room 101 is a short horror game and a first-person psychological horror experience, focused on exploration, atmosphere, and uncovering a hidden story through documents and environmental clues scattered throughout the hospital.

name: MEGABOOBS 🔞
short_description: A fully NSFW 3D survivor roguelite packed with massive, hyper-proportioned heroines, intense action, and uncensored adult content. Stack powerful builds, survive endless hordes, and unlock highly explicit hentai scenes as you push deeper into the run.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10
現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Urban Rangers Arcade 2
short_description: This Is The Conclusion To The Great "Urban Rangers Arcade" - Grab A Friend For This Co-Op Event. The Rangers, Thought They Had BoJaNgLeS Taken Down.............. But The Nightmare Had Only Began...... Bo Is Back, And Hes Calling The Rangers By Name. You Got His Attention...... Finish The Fight.

name: The Dungeon Persists
short_description: A top-down, pixel-art roguelike dungeon crawler. Pick one of 6 heroes and descend through an endless run of procedurally generated floors. Build a run from weapons, relics and gear, fight 24 enemy types and 4 bosses, and carry meta-progression forward. It was here before you. It will be here after.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Progression +20
成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10

name: Goblin Camp
short_description: Build a new home for your goblins! Grow your settlement from a little encampment to a bustling city in a beautiful procedurally generated northern forest. Fish, farm, explore the forest and harness the spirits in a unique fantasy citybuilder inspired by Finnish mythology.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Tri City Monsters
short_description: Tri City Monsters is a supernatural, monsterlovin' visual novel where you can romance and/or de-pants 3 demonic love interests. Navigate a dangerous urban jungle with their help and maybe you'll get a taste of what it means to be a monster.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: ELYSIUM : Blue Den Mansion
short_description: A first-person psychological horror game where you explore a mysterious mansion, solve puzzles, uncover dark secrets, and survive a terrifying creature lurking in the shadows.

name: Ocean Rush
short_description: Ocean Rush is a fast-paced ocean escape adventure where every second counts!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Pore Cleaning Simulator
short_description: Grab, pull, and pop blackheads out. A weirdly satisfying pore-cleaning simulator.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Qwerty's Quickies
short_description: Want to type longer and harder in the bedroom? Look no further than Qwerty's Quickies! An adult comedy typing survival game. Type to survive as security chases the streaker through aisles of a busy supermarket. See how long you last in Qwerty's Quickies. Including minigames with more coming soon.

name: Forever Virgin Simulator
short_description: A hardcore visual novel about how hard it is to be a virgin in the modern world.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: AeroBird
short_description: AeroBird is a fast-paced acrobatic platformer where every jump matters.
reasons: 現在プレイヤー10人以上 +5

name: Warframe: Mesa Heirloom Collection
short_description: Draw on the legacy of the unparalleled gunslinger with the Mesa Heirloom Collection. Heirloom Customizations signify the passage of time and the dedication of the Tenno.

name: 魔法少女甜心3D Magical Girl Sweetheart 3D
short_description: Magical Girl Sweetheart turns all scenes into dessert-themed wonderlands with match-link gameplay. There are 20 major scenes, each containing 3 renovation stages, with over 430 different desserts in total. There are no time limits, and players can unlock all achievements easily.

name: Hentai Flesh
short_description: Embark on a relaxing and sensual puzzle journey with Hentai Glacial, where each calming level and every completed image gently soothes your mind.

name: Ashen Crown
short_description: A single-player roguelite autobattler built almost entirely with AI. Pick a fighter, climb 20 battles to a final boss, and win in the build you assemble: 12 weapons, 24 classes, 53 subspecs, 247 skills. Go deep on one path or sprawl across many and break the game open.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelite +10

name: Abyrith
short_description: Abyrith is a traditional turn-based roguelike. Each run lets you build a unique character by combining skills and equipment while exploring and conquering dungeons.
reasons: 成長/積み上げ要素: Roguelike +10

name: 人生记事簿：Life Memoirs
short_description: A choice-driven text game about living an ordinary life in modern China. Shape your path through study, work, love, and family, and see how your future unfolds year by year.

name: Swordless
short_description: A broken sword... The left hand controls the hilt, the right hand guides the blade. They work together to reach the end, and unite as one!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Haggle simulator
short_description: A Monopoly-style board game focused on negotiation, trading, and bidding between players. Can take out loans from the bank. be careful—late payments may result in asset repossession! Trade via group chat or private messages. Cross-play with mobile players. Come and sharpen your haggling skills!
reasons: 現在プレイヤー1人以上 +2

name: Booox
short_description: "Booox" is a platform puzzle game where players control multiple characters simultaneously, coordinating their actions to solve challenges.

name: BAFF C
short_description: Minimalist, hardcore and challenging game in the genre of avoid-em up that will test your reflexes, timing and planning! This game is hard as hell!

name: Blobbin
short_description: Blobbin is a cozy 2D idle clicker where you poke, bounce, upgrade, and evolve adorable blobs to earn mountains of Goo. Unlock new blob types, prestige for powerful bonuses, and experiment with Blob Alchemy as your squishy little blob empire grows.

name: Brandon's Semiconductor Simulator
short_description: Educational tool for the simulation and visualization of semiconductor devices. Users can draw circuits and devices with just a few brush strokes. This is a fully interactive, realistic simulation with many visualization options and a variety of hand-made demonstrations of semiconductor devices.

name: Health Audit Simulator
short_description: Step into the shoes of a Health Auditor. FIND, FLAG and RATE potential Risks and Hazards across 20 playable environments, between two differing difficulty variants.

name: Diagram Awesome
short_description: Create expressive static or animated diagrams with generated visuals directly inside your nodes and connections. Ideal for game loops, workflows, story structures, learning material, and visualizing complex ideas in a more intuitive and creative way.

name: Hentai Tales: 7 Days Cycle
short_description: I keep dying and returning to the same day seven days earlier. To escape this endless loop, I must anchor my fading memories through intimate bonds with four unique women—each holding a piece of the truth behind the temporal fracture.
